suggestions.title: Secret can be created with an empty value
suggestions.resolution: Secret creation is now derived from whether `trapiCredentialSecretValue` is non-empty in main.bicep, eliminating empty secret creation paths.

suggestions.title: Key Vault is publicly reachable by default
suggestions.resolution: Left unchanged to avoid introducing connectivity regressions without the companion private endpoint/network ACL design in this issue scope.

suggestions.title: No in-branch evidence for `az deployment group validate` pass
suggestions.resolution: Validation command was executed in sandbox but cannot complete without Azure authentication (`az login`).
